description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modern commercial structure with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The front and one side feature large, rectangular glass windows, providing clear visibility into the interior. The entrance is a single glass door located on the front right, framed in dark trim that matches the roof and base. The roof is flat and bordered by a thick, dark parapet, with two small vent-like structures visible on top. The kiosk sits on a slightly raised, square platform, and a small, boxy protrusion is present on the left side, possibly for utilities or service access. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by white and dark gray tones, giving it a contemporary urban appearance.
description: A modern, boxy kiosk with large glass windows, a single glass door, and a flat, dark-edged roof, set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large glass windows and the main glass door on the right, framed by dark trim.
description_view_1: Rear view with a solid wall and no windows or doors, only the flat roof and parapet visible.
description_view_2: Left side view showing a solid wall and a small, boxy protrusion extending from the side.
description_view_3: Right side view with a large glass window and the main glass door, both framed in dark trim.
attribute_window_presence: Two large rectangular windows on the front and right side
attribute_door_configuration: One single glass door on the front right
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with thick dark parapet and two small vent structures
